message:
feat(channel): add partition fault injection (bd-2ktrc.2)

PartitionController + PartitionSender wrapper for simulating network
partitions between actor pairs. Supports directed/symmetric partitions,
drop/error modes, heal/heal_all, evidence logging, and stats tracking.
27 tests (11 unit + 16 integration) covering all 7 pass criteria.

Also includes minor clippy/lint fixes for fault.rs and session_types.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
